name: Bateman Park
description: Come play pickleball at Bateman Park in Galesburg, IL! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are not available. The courts are free. Amenities include lights.

name: Hawthorne Gym Pickleball Courts
description: Hawthorne Gym Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in Galesburg, IL. There are 3 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Knox County YMCA
description: Knox County YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Galesburg, IL. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. A membership is required to play.

name: Lakeside Recreation Facility
description: Lakeside Recreation Facility is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Galesburg, IL. There are 4 indoor clay courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Oak Run Hoa Tennis Courts
description: Private courts for Oak Run POA members and guests
